areas.label: Economy & money
areas.synthesis: The INPC fell 0.27% from May. Annual inflation was 3.37%, down from 4.32% a year earlier.

headlines.title: Annual inflation falls to 3.37% in June
headlines.context: The INPC fell 0.27% from May. Annual inflation was 3.37%, down from 4.32% a year earlier.

headlines.title: Banxico keeps the policy rate at 6.50%
headlines.context: Banxico kept its target rate unchanged at 6.50% on June 25. The vote was unanimous.

headlines.title: May remittances rebound to a 2026-high $5.6B
headlines.context: Banxico reports $5.611bn in remittances in May, up from $4.978bn in April and the highest monthly total so far in 2026.

areas.label: Payments
areas.synthesis: The deal would give Equifax 100% of Círculo de Crédito and is expected to close in the fourth quarter, subject to regulatory approval.

headlines.title: Equifax agrees to buy Círculo de Crédito for a $750M enterprise value
headlines.context: The deal would give Equifax 100% of Círculo de Crédito and is expected to close in the fourth quarter, subject to regulatory approval.

areas.label: Trade
areas.synthesis: Trade under USMCA continues. The United States declined a 16-year extension, so the agreement now moves to annual reviews and more negotiations; Mexico and the United States meet again the week of July 20.

headlines.title: USMCA stays in force, but the U.S. declined a 16-year extension.
headlines.context: Trade under USMCA continues. The United States declined a 16-year extension, so the agreement now moves to annual reviews and more negotiations; Mexico and the United States meet again the week of July 20.

areas.label: Politics
areas.synthesis: Pending federal and local judicial elections move from 2027 to 2028, and the Supreme Court's structure changes. A separate decree adds foreign interference as grounds to void an election.

headlines.title: Second judicial reform published in the DOF: judicial elections pushed to 2028, Supreme Court restructured
headlines.context: Pending federal and local judicial elections move from 2027 to 2028, and the Supreme Court's structure changes. A separate decree adds foreign interference as grounds to void an election.

areas.label: Society & security
areas.synthesis: The government says the daily average fell from 86.9 victims in September 2024 to 47.3 in May 2026. These are preliminary government figures; the formal monthly SESNSP release is separate.

headlines.title: Government reports the daily homicide average down 46% since September 2024
headlines.context: The government says the daily average fell from 86.9 victims in September 2024 to 47.3 in May 2026. These are preliminary government figures; the formal monthly SESNSP release is separate.

areas.label: U.S.–Mexico
areas.synthesis: Mexico says it will seek criminal complaints over 17 deaths connected to ICE, 14 in custody and three during operations. It will also pursue civil action against private detention operators.

headlines.title: Mexico to file complaints over deaths connected to U.S. immigration enforcement
headlines.context: Mexico says it will seek criminal complaints over 17 deaths connected to ICE, 14 in custody and three during operations. It will also pursue civil action against private detention operators.

headlines.title: May U.S. goods deficit with Mexico widens to US$21.1bn
headlines.context: The U.S. goods deficit with Mexico was US$21.13bn in May, up from US$15.35bn in April.
